entry.name: tasksJson
entry.label: Serialized task data (legacy; migrated to file on first run)

entry.name: storagePath
entry.label: Absolute path to the tasks JSON file

entry.name: migratedToFile
entry.label: Whether tasks have been migrated from plasmoid config to file storage

entry.name: showPriority
entry.label: Show color stripe on the left edge of each task to indicate priority

entry.name: addToTop
entry.label: Insert new tasks at the top of the list instead of the bottom

entry.name: hideCompleted
entry.label: Whether to hide completed tasks from the list

entry.name: verboseDates
entry.label: Show due dates as Today/Tomorrow/Yesterday when near, otherwise always a numeric date

entry.name: syncEnabled
entry.label: Poll the task file every 3 seconds to pick up changes from Syncthing or other sync tools

entry.name: managedCategories
entry.label: JSON array of user-managed category names

entry.name: markdownExport
entry.label: Also write a Markdown mirror of tasks on every save

entry.name: markdownPath
entry.label: Absolute path to the Markdown export file
